text.en: AlphaGo combined policy networks, value networks and Monte Carlo tree search.
text.zh: AlphaGo 结合了策略网络、价值网络和蒙特卡洛树搜索。

text.en: The 2016 match against Lee Sedol made AlphaGo a public landmark for strategic AI.
text.zh: 2016 年与李世石的对局让 AlphaGo 成为战略型 AI 的公众标志事件。

text.en: Modern Go analysis engines can expose policy suggestions, win-rate shifts and search variations for interactive demonstrations.
text.zh: 现代围棋分析引擎可用于交互演示策略建议、胜率变化和搜索分支。
